title: Claude Code Tips: A Living Knowledge Base

four_principles.name: Watch, then adopt
four_principles.description: Don't implement every trending technique immediately. Observe the trend, wait for stability, then adopt when ready.

four_principles.name: Freshness is the central data point
four_principles.description: Timestamps matter more than coverage. A stale best-practice is worse than no documentation.

four_principles.name: Review and decision conferences
four_principles.description: Periodic stepping back to evaluate what recent changes mean for the big picture before making calls.

four_principles.name: Don't reinvent the wheel
four_principles.description: Search our own database before building. The community has probably solved it already.

automation_status.bookmark_fetching: Manual (~2x/week). Scheduled tasks tried March 9-13, disabled due to reliability issues.
automation_status.enrichment_pipeline: Working. Keywords, summaries, link resolution, Gemini analysis.
